title: Avatar Component
content:
This module provides a set of reusable Avatar components, built upon the `@radix-ui/react-avatar` primitive. It allows for displaying user profiles or other images with fallback options.

## Key Exports

*   **`Avatar`**: The main container for the avatar. It accepts standard `AvatarPrimitive.Root` props.
*   **`AvatarImage`**: Displays the avatar image. It accepts standard `AvatarPrimitive.Image` props.
*   **`AvatarFallback`**: Renders a fallback element (e.g., initials) when the image cannot be loaded. It accepts standard `AvatarPrimitive.Fallback` props.

## Props

All components accept standard `className` props for custom styling, and pass through any other props to their respective Radix UI primitives.

### `Avatar`

Accepts `React.ComponentProps<typeof AvatarPrimitive.Root>`.

### `AvatarImage`

Accepts `React.ComponentProps<typeof AvatarPrimitive.Image>`.

### `AvatarFallback`

Accepts `React.ComponentProps<typeof AvatarPrimitive.Fallback>`.

## Usage Example

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar";

function UserProfile() {
  return (
    <Avatar>
      <AvatarImage src="https://github.com/shadcn.png" alt="@shadcn" />
      <AvatarFallback>CN</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
  );
}

export default UserProfile;
```

This example shows how to use the `Avatar` component with an `AvatarImage` source and a simple `AvatarFallback` that displays "CN" if the image fails to load.
